ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation - Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hi John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been received and is now being processed.

Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
Order Total: $129.99

Item(s):
- "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones" – Qty: 1 – $79.99
- "Portable Charger 20000mAh" – Qty: 1 – $49.99

Shipping Method: Standard Delivery (5-7 business days)
Shipping Address:
John Doe
123 Maple Street
Anytown, NY 12345

If you need to modify your order, please log in to your Amazon account or reply to this email. For any questions, contact our Customer Support at <URL>.

Happy Shopping!

--
Amazon Customer Service Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 is Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

Our records indicate that your QuickBooks invoice #987654, dated 03/15/2026, remains unpaid. As a result, your QuickBooks Online services will be suspended in 48 hours.

To avoid interruption, please verify your account information and complete the payment within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in a permanent suspension of your QuickBooks Online access.

Click the button below to review and pay your invoice immediately:

[Pay Now] <URL>

If you did not authorize this payment, or if you believe this is an error, please contact QuickBooks Support immediately at <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

QuickBooks Billing Team
